name: wren-engine
description: AI agent skills for Wren Engine CLI — semantic SQL layer for 22+ data sources.

skills.name: wren-dlt-connector
skills.description: Connect SaaS data (HubSpot, Stripe, Salesforce, GitHub, Slack, etc.) to Wren Engine for SQL analysis via dlt pipelines into DuckDB, then auto-generate a Wren semantic project.

skills.name: wren-generate-mdl
skills.description: Generate a Wren MDL project by exploring a database with available tools (SQLAlchemy, database drivers, MCP connectors, or raw SQL). Guides agents through schema discovery, type normalization, and MDL YAML generation using the wren CLI.

skills.name: wren-usage
skills.description: Wren Engine CLI workflow guide for AI agents. Triggers on data questions, reports, metrics, revenue, trends, 'how many', 'show me', 'top N', 'compare', 'breakdown'. Answer data questions end-to-end using the wren CLI.
